notes: Name must start with a letter or underscore; dots and dashes are allowed thereafter; max 64 (confirmed). Parameters use an OpenAPI-3.0 SUBSET — the allowlist shown is the Vertex/Firebase baseline. default, oneOf, exclusiveMinimum/exclusiveMaximum, and additionalProperties are not supported. The Gemini Enterprise variant additionally supports anyOf/$ref/$defs — model that as a separate `gemini-enterprise` profile if you target it. Very large or deeply nested schemas may be rejected at request time.
